subcodes.first_line: Say: When We journeyed from the Orient of eternity unto the Occident of darkness, We found a people of the Mount who were [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل انا لما سافرنا من مشرق البقا الی مغرب العما وجدنا قوما من الطوریون کانوا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @Mosaic imagery, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
